recommendations.title: The Return of the Living Dead
recommendations.overview: When two bumbling employees at a medical supply warehouse accidentally release a deadly gas into the air, the vapors cause the dead to rise again as zombies.

recommendations.title: Dead Space: Aftermath

recommendations.title: Jodorowsky's Dune
recommendations.overview: In 1974, Chilean-French director Alejandro Jodorowsky embarked on the quixotic project of adapting Frank Herbert's influential novel Dune (1969) for the big screen. After investing two years, and millions of dollars, the gigantic project ended in fai

recommendations.title: The Cure
recommendations.overview: Erik, a loner, finds a friend in Dexter, an eleven-year-old boy with AIDS. They vow to find a cure for AIDS together and save Dexter's life in an eventful summer.

recommendations.title: M3GAN
recommendations.overview: A brilliant toy company roboticist uses artificial intelligence to develop M3GAN, a life-like doll programmed to emotionally bond with her newly orphaned niece. But when the doll's programming works too well, she becomes overprotective of her new fri

recommendations.title: Demon Seed
recommendations.overview: A scientist creates Proteus, an organic supercomputer with artificial intelligence which becomes obsessed with human beings, and in particular the creator's wife.

recommendations.title: D.O.A.
recommendations.overview: Dexter Cornell, an English Professor becomes embroiled in a series of murders involving people around him. Dexter has good reason to want to find the murderer but hasn't much time. He finds help and comfort from one of his student, Sydney Fuller.

recommendations.title: Dexter's Laboratory: Ego Trip
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Action, Drama

recommendations.title: The Girl with All the Gifts
recommendations.overview: In the future, a strange fungus has changed nearly everyone into thoughtless, flesh-eating monsters. When a scientist and a teacher find a girl who seems to be immune to the fungus, they all begin a journey to save humanity.

recommendations.title: Reign of Assassins
